name: Wallace & Gromit in The Grand Getaway

reviews.review_title: I really want to enjoy it but...
reviews.review_description: So while playing the first couple of chapters, they don't do a great job explaining exactly what you need to do which ends up being quite confusing and you'll be looking around for 10 minutes trying to figure out where a screwdriver is, but the thing that just kills it is this one part in chapter 5 which I swear to god is impossible. It's like a shooting gallery, however the gun is mounted on a post and doesn't control great, the targets move way too fast and they send out more than you can hit at times, and it seems like to get through you basically have to do it perfectly, the worst part is it shows that I'm so close to completing it but it just makes me have to retry. Oh and also the mixed reality minigame? Good luck finding a room in a British house that conforms to its strict space requirements, I'd literally have to tear down a wall to be able to play it.

All the visuals, 3D, object designs, sounds, and music are brilliant~!
Sadly, much of the gameplay is a tad off, quite the odd way of controlling actions, and cut-scenes are long in the tooth.  
Foggy in-game directions leave you in a pickle more than once, leading to ruffled feathers and an urge to smash your own household goods.  Down two stars on the bother of wonky control for things that should be much easier.

5 stars when I started this game from start to
 finish i really love being in the world of Wallace and gromit and the detail of the scenes and characters were just so cool and the adventure of the game was just so amazingly awesome I can't say how amazing the game was just 5 STARS.
Chuis un giga chan de Wallace et gromit, du coup je l'ai vite acheté comme un zgeg... Et bah bien éclaté

I have started this game, and I really like what I’ve seen so far. I love W&G, so was excited for this one. The issue is about control: the game starts setting you up as a robot, which quite quickly gains the ability to grab objects remotely. Great! But then the 2nd scene you are suddenly playing Gromit (the dog), and can’t do that any more. The game has a ‘seated’ co figuration option, but no co trial to allow you to get up or down, and the 2nd scene requires this, so the only way to actually play it is standing, so you can physically crouch down, and be able to walk around a bit to get the various items you need since when playing as Gromit you any remote grab. Too bad, would be 5 star if they fix this!
Time for tee / chapter 5 is impossible
Greatest game ever
10/10 great puzzles bit hard and great cheese and crackers

Saw ps2vr, pcvr release, and I bought this for quest long ago and havn't played yet!

the good, cute visual, short, easy puzzle game.
the bad, don't get the brit humor. golfing mechanic awful.
the ugly, tiny subtitle bug on bottom even when turned off.

Worth it at sale, for short weekend puzzle.

this always been my favorite show growing up and seeing it in vr just made me wanna buy it instantly so i did and it was the best game everan artistic style don't get me started it's amazing so best cartoon game ever seen ever bought

The negatives that others mentioned I have experienced too, it seems they haven't fixed them yet. Grabbing things is difficult. This is a problem in chapter 2, because if you drop something you may not be able to pick it up. Because of this I had to start chapter 2 again, because I dropped the vacuum cleaner and even though I bent down, I couldn't reach it. The gears also only go back to their place if you let go of them. If you're lucky, they won't fall to the ground. :) The standing mode is not comfortable, but it seems to work better than the sitting mode. Pay attention to the instructions in the first chapter on how to throw and move, because you will need it later, as well as to find hidden things. The game is worth trying, but the annoying things should be ignored. The game is short, the tasks are simple, but the graphics, atmosphere and music are great.

So I have been a avid Wallace and Gromit fan. Saw it from the beginning when they had a grand day out. I played a bit of their point and click titles and it was amazing. 
I had to try it since it was free to get for quest members. I started out in a small room, but it was too hard to play. I couldn't get past the area I started at cause it didn't explain how to actually throw stuff. The second time I tried the game I did find a bit bigger space to play. I did get further to the second chapter. But was stopped from going on cause the amount of room to open the cabinet was far.

 So today I tried it again in a very big space in my living room. It worked and I did manage to get to the golfing part, till it made you have to play a shooting gallery game to get Wallace to progress. The shooting gallery game was really hard for me. Since the camera for me was stuck behind the shooting thing and it obstructed my view of the middle of it. The hard thing to get was how fast everything was. It was hard for me to keep track of where everything was popping up and moving. I am guessing you have to get everything in the shooting gallery to progress cause I miss a lot and it won't let me lower the shooting thing that you use to shoot with. I wish it was better and not so hard to see. 

I really want to love this game, but sadly I see why so many have a hard time figuring things out in this game. It's hard to play at times and the animation/voices are amazing. If they ever fix it I might replay it maybe.
A bit weird to understand on the controls side, but otherwise it was a fun (but short) game. The fans of those characters will love it too I'm sure !

reviews.review_title: I really wanted to like this game...
reviews.review_description:
The graphics and animations are amazing and I felt like I was really in the world but, there was a few bugs and one was game breaking...

The first is when you are the robot thing, the radio tells you what to do. She offers no help apart from one sentence. If you don't know what she is asking of you the first time then you got no idea. 

Second was I had trouble picking up things off the floor which was negated by the upgrade to the robot but when I was the dog it was so hard to pick things off the floor like the cogs.

The third and final game breaker was when you play as the dog and you have to fix a machine. The radio and Wallace both kept telling me over and over what needed to be done but it could not.  

All I had to do was pull a cord and I spent a good 15 minutes pulling the cord as many different ways as I could think of.

I really wanted to love this but how can I if I can't even pull a freaking cord? 😭

I know, let's spend a ton of time completely reinventing all the control systems used by VR apps. Then we'll have a voice actor moan at you on a loop telling you to do the thing you haven't done yet without telling you how to do it.  I don't believe for a second they ever play tested this game by watching new users try it. So disappointing, because they have nailed the look and voice acting.  Such a waste.

reviews.review_title: Good or at least "OK", but only if …
reviews.review_description:
… you can accept a somewhat slow story-telling speed, easy puzzles and being stuck in a story that unfolds while you interact – this is the opposite of an open-world sandbox.
…
Essentially, it's a typical Wallace & Gromit adventure told interactively through a series of mini-games over a short period of 1.5 to 2 hours. The character is fixed in position in each scene/chapter (no walking). Interaction with the world is very limited – except for the required elements. Although there is an optional element for collectors/perfectionists, a replay value is virtually nonexistent.
…
I had no control-issues, no bugs and any task (if unclear) became obvious after checking for "active" objects to interacted with.
…
In the end I enjoyed this little "game"/adventure, the graphics and the voice-acting, even without being a huge fan of Wallace & Gromit. The bizarre world and its creatures were lovely.

First Off... The Animation Is Amazing! I like how they did the stop motion Animation like the real movies second off the gameplay! It was fun but short so a DLC can do it? It could make it longer! And I love how you can sorta play as Grommit! 5/5 Had a Cracking Good Time!
When I got this game I wanted to try the MR mode, but no matter how big I made the space setup or boundary, it wouldn't check of that it had to be at least 3m×3.5m

This is one of my favourite British characters and being able to go on a simple trip is really fun even though its basic its still got some references to its other films I love the work they put in this game highly a true British masterpiece

I can't even get past the second task in this app with my 3S.  The BERYL continues to tell me to wave my hands and hold the controller triggers while it completes a circle, then when the circle completes it just repeatedly tells me to continue to do it all over again.  There's no way to advance past it or even control buttons to go back to the Options menu.  Very disappointing, I was really looking forward to experiencing this app.

reviews.review_title: I liked it and idk why others don’t?
reviews.review_description: This game is awsome. It feels like ur thrown into a crazy episode of walus and gromit and it’s amazing.

As a fan of Wallace & Gromit, and this game being included in Meta Quest+, I just knew I had to try this game first… and it was awesome! It has the humor from the Wallace & Gromit shows, and had some great fun activities to complete. Using either the controllers or hand tracking worked fine, though a bit glitchy at times, it wasn’t anything that didn’t take more than just another attempt at grabbing. I would gladly play a sequel to this game.

The pacing in Wallace and Gromit: The Grand Getaway is painfully slow, and the controls are clunky and awkward. The whole thing felt off, and the story dragged so much that it was hard to stay interested. It just wasn’t fun to play and felt like it needed a lot more work. Wouldn’t recommend it.

Here you go, ready to copy-paste!

The graphics are wonderful and the Wallace & Gromit shenanigans are all in place. But trying to pick objects up makes it feel like you are wearing boxing gloves. You're screwed if you drop something on the ground as it's almost impossible to reach it. The same goes for throwing, it's frustrating and spoils the game. There are also times when it's not obvious what you should be doing. Beryl isn't much help when you need her. I really wanted to like this game but I just gave up.
Slightly clunky controls, has option to play sitting but it rlly doesn’t work well. Fun game overall, I enjoyed it. Also, the bonus game Jamtastic requires entirely too much room to play- 10m x 10m

My only issue is very rampant in vr games, which is the fact it’s only a campaign, and that campaign can be beaten in very little time. Jamtastic also has an issue in which it says my living room is too small, even though when I measure it it meets the specifications. In the end it’s a fun game that you will only play once and never touch again unless you don’t have any issues with jamtastic

reviews.review_title: Cannot go very far into the game
reviews.review_description: I should have read the comments before spending any dollar on this game. I am a big fan of Wallace & Gromit and when I saw there was a game in which I could pair up with them, I was ready to go… alas after grabbing the first two golf balls, I am stuck, unable to get the remaining balls, waving my hands like a fool in my living room, receiving the same message over and over. The interaction and reactivity needs to be improved. Not useful at all. Very disappointed retired guy… there are so many great games out there, so I wonder why this one is pretending to be so great.

reviews.review_title: A short interactive adventure for fans?
reviews.review_description:
This is more of an interactive story than a full-fledged game—about a third of the time is spent listening to NPCs. The mechanics and gameplay feel outdated, more like something from 2019 rather than late 2023. The puzzles are extremely easy and offer little to no challenge.

Visually, the game looks nice, but it suffers from stability issues (played on Q3). I’m not familiar with the Wallace & Gromit universe, so perhaps it’s primarily aimed at fans of the series.

I played it only because it was available on Quest+ and is set to be removed tomorrow. Unlike other reviews, I didn’t encounter any bugs. The entire game can be completed in about an hour.

It is a very nice looking game and if it was stable I'm sure it would be great. I encountered 3 different bugs each time I started. Firstly I got only as far as the notebook and it wouldn't open. It was also positioned in an awkward position and kept disappearing. Second bug , it took ages to get the scanner to open, eventually it did but when it came to picking up the box of golf balls, it wouldn't pick up. I didn't even get as far as the notebook. I just un-installed it out of frustration. Very disappointed.
It's painful to do anything in this game because of the controls.
Amazing I loved playing as grommit and the robot and going to mars just the animation to it's all amazing 🤩👍👍

reviews.review_title: 5 stars to balance out the 1 stars
reviews.review_description:
A lot of complaints about the controls and getting stuck in the first tutorial room. I’ve played a lot of vr so didn’t have that problem, but I can see why people do. 

You do need to point your hand out lower than you’d expect, after a few seconds of picking stuff up, I adapted and never had to think about it after. But wait for what you’re wanting to pick up until it’s highlighted, then press the grab button, don’t go grabbing away at nothing and end up being frustrated. 

And if you’re stuck and not sure what to do next, bring up your notepad, the game teaches you this. And to throw accurately, bring the item to your mouth and the game shows you where it’ll go with arced line, the game teaches you this also. 

It is quite slow paced and is more aimed as a vr experience imo, but the controls do take a bit of finesse ￼

Can't even get past the set up page couldn't open the note pad, came out, went back in, couldn't pick up the balls, came out and back in, couldn't even register waving my hands. Awful game won't be playing

developer_response.body: Hi there! I'm excited to share that we've recently rolled out an update for the Wallace & Gromit: The Grand Getaway. This update addresses previous issues and enhances the overall smoothness of the experience. We've also made improvements to the controls for a more intuitive and enjoyable gameplay. I would love for you to revisit the adventure and see the improvements for yourself. Give Wallace & Gromit another go—I hope you'll be pleasantly surprised!

reviews.review_description:
I love Aardman but I'm a VR designer and hand-on-heart this is honestly one of the worst designed pieces of software I've ever encountered. The art is great (altho the character frame rate choice doesn't feel pleasant in VR tbh), performances and music are great. It feels on-brand for W&G, so all that side is pretty cool. 

However, the interactions on this are unintuitive and clunky, the onboarding is awful and confusing, and it's missing basic VR considerations like a sitting mode(!), autosaving (or even manual saving!)  The interactions are kind of nonsensical - for instance you can't throw a huge box in a case right in front of you, you have to eat it (?!?) then it automatically spits it out and wangs around until it lands behind the case. Uh-huh, okay. Moving between teleport points is laborious - you have to make a binocular shape with your hands and then wait while it scans to show you the teleport point, then sends you - so much worse than just point and go.  It's frustratingly static to play, can't pick up items right in front of you, have to use a remote grab which sometimes just won't work.  It's borked up or misdirected me back to the menu a few times and YOU HAVE TO START ALL OVER AGAIN losing all chapter progress each time.  Mostly linear so there's zero reason. It doesn't even let you skip long dialogue scenes you've seen before to catch back up. 
And the gameplay seems to be a lot of directed tasks and no fun at all. Maybe it picks up later on but this is a terrible first contact with the user in so many ways and is incredibly restrictive in letting you do things you want to do. 

It honestly feels such a shame - the art team here did a great job but the design is awful awful awful in so many obvious ways -- and despite the Aardman love that's clearly here, I just don't want to play any more. Massive missed opportunity because of the terrible design decisions here.

developer_response.body: Hi there! I'm excited to share that we've recently rolled out an update for the Wallace & Gromit: The Grand Getaway. This update addresses some other issues that were pointed out and enhances the overall smoothness of the experience. We've also made improvements to the controls for a more intuitive and enjoyable gameplay. I would love for you to revisit the adventure and see the improvements for yourself. Give Wallace & Gromit another go—I hope you'll be pleasantly surprised!

reviews.review_title: Game stuck - will not show the Notebook
reviews.review_description:
Stuck!
Meta Quest 2
I’m having a problem, the Notebook will not come up.  Just after the golf ball launcher is placed in the suitcase, when the auto caddy is directed to look at the notebook, I get the notebook ghost image but it will not show or launch into view.  I tried deleting and reloading the game, but I get to the same point.
I tried an email to customer support- no response back.  I really did not want to write a ‘Griping Review’ but so far a waste of time and tease- the game looks fun.
Any solution or operator error?

reviews.review_title: Awful, awful, awful and then some ☹️
reviews.review_description:
Awful VR mechanics.
Awful frame rate, even on Quest 3.  If this is supposed to represent claymation then it fails miserably, characters are a blurry mess when moving laterally across your view 
Awfully boring to play.
Total waste of a good franchise.
First game I've not been bothered to finish and have uninstalled because I never will!!
I wish I'd tried it when I first bought it because it would have been only the second game I'd have ever asked for a refund on.  The first was Dirt Rally 2 on the Rift because it wouldn't even start up.  This would be the first refund for being a total borefest.

reviews.review_description: Nice to look Wallace and Gromit in the eyes. But... what a terrible and confusing way to use the controlers. They never react as you expect. Absulute not funny at all.

reviews.review_description: This game is fun, however it is a very short game maybe make different worlds to explore and last longer than it did.

developer_response.body:
Hi Dawndaury,

Thank you for taking the time to write this review. I do understand your frustration about the experience's length. However, it is a narrative choice that is made to make the core experience similar to an interactive movie. 

If you want the fun to last longer, from the main menu you can replay four mini games, complete all the modes in Jamtastic! or try to find all the collectables. There are also more than 30 achievements to unlock!

Good luck and have fun :)

reviews.review_description: I would like to have sex with Wallace after playing this

reviews.review_title: WALLACE AND GROMIT ARE IN MY HOUSE
reviews.review_description: PLEASE HELP THEY KEEP TAKING MY CHEESE AND CRACKERS AND GROMIT TRIED TO KILL MY PENGUIN! PLEASE HELP THEY ALSO MADE ME HIT ASTROIDS WITH A BAT SO HEL-*Bonk!* Im just crackers for cheese!

Good time all around for everyone and a nice play through 

The surroundings had me interested in the world and the story was great 

Wallace and Gromit fans will love and hopefully others 

And Wallace was smexy

I was going through the start with hand tracking and I was unable to teleport over the other side of the room and the auto caddy’s hand started to glitch everywhere everything fine but still a great game

developer_response.body: Greetings RealHamburger! Thanks for your cracking review! We are sorry that you experienced some issues with the hand-tracking mode. It would be very helpful if you could send an email to support@astreaimmersive.io to get more context about what happened. Thanks again and have a grand day!

reviews.review_description: This game is short, takes a bit to figure out the controls. However that said, you get it figured out and you’re off to the races. It is a puzzle game for the most part with a story.  It’s fun!

I love this game and think it is really cool and creative but there is one part that I haven’t gotten past yet. The shooting part on mars. This stupid mini game makes me want to rip my hair out and it made me rage quit. Idk if it’s because I’m short or a skill issue but it is incredibly frustrating.

This update addresses some other issues that were pointed out and enhances the overall smoothness of the experience. reviews.review_description: The best game on earth

This game does a spectacular job at placing you in Wallace and Gomits' world! The adventure is packed with great puzzle solving fun. The animation is phenomenal! I have played this a few times & will again. It's just a joy to play.

The game says it can be played sitting but
 there are moments using items in front of you that are at the wrong height that make it a struggle to complete puzzles, it's not fun when you have to get your hubby to step in and do those bits because you can't stand up yourself. Other than that I loved being in the world of Wallace and Gromit

developer_response.body: Hello CrazyOldCatLady! Hi there! I'm excited to share that we've recently rolled out an update for the Wallace & Gromit: The Grand Getaway and it includes sitting mode! Sorry for the long wait, but it's finally here. In the suitcase menu, go to the options to change the playing mode. There you go! I hope you'll be able to fully enjoy our experience!

reviews.review_description: This simple and fun game is perfectly targeted to newer and younger audiences. Beautiful, silly and fun experience that allows us to join Wallace and Gromit on one of their adventures. I wish that the next instalment would be more focused on a building game like Gadgeteer or a full puzzle game like A fisherman’s tale.
As a young child I used to watch Wallace and gromit and I was in love and now I am very happy their is a game based on my childhood ❤

reviews.review_title: Wallace and gromit is the best
reviews.review_description: The game is amazing
Fun game! Played this with my 8yr old son. He needed a little help through some of the puzzles but overall very kid/family friendly game.
I’ve watched most of the Wallace and Gromit movies/episodes and I’m really enjoying the game! But I’ve spent a very long time on chapter five and can’t seem to get it can any one help?

developer_response.body:
Hello MaxRonVR! It's fantastic to hear that you're a fan of Wallace and Gromit and that you're enjoying the game! We're sorry, though, to hear you've hit a snag in chapter five. We understand how frustrating it can be to get stuck at a certain point.

We're here to help! For personalized assistance and tips on navigating through chapter five, please don't hesitate to reach out to us directly at support@astreaimmersive.io. Our support team is ready to provide you with the guidance you need to move forward and continue enjoying the adventure.

Thank you for playing, and for your enthusiasm about Wallace and Gromit. We look forward to helping you get past this hurdle!

reviews.review_description: Love playing it, but it can not save. While playing it does show chapter 1 and chapter 2 but when I exit game I have to start all over. No way to load from where I left off. Very upsetting.

reviews.review_description: I think they should add more mini games because there are only like 4 mini games and they don’t last that long and kinda get boring easily. I think the developing team should add baseball or a mini game of golf and actually have holes but after playing the game brings back childhood memories. So I think this game is worth it.
Short but very fun
My game kept crashing

reviews.review_description:
A TV classic landing on the Meta Quest. Feels like joining Wallace and Gromit right there in one of their films. 

✨️M Q 3 . B I O . L I N K✨️
If you like, just open your browser and type without the spaces. Then choose Wallace and Gromit to get the game for less back here in the official Meta store. 

Brings back memories of enjoying the show together with my family. Can't wait to let them try this game and let them see what VR can do that a flatscreen cannot. 

Gameplaywise this is an escape game with tasks to pass before you can move on to the next scene. Nothing special here, yet the lovely atmosphere and humor take it to the next level. 

So far I think it's perfect for people new to VR because movement works via teleportation with no risk of getting motion sickness. Especially the charming theme will draw many people in.

reviews.review_title: Please can we have more adventures!
reviews.review_description: It's a must play game. I've loved it, for me it wasn't long enough I really hope there's lots more adventures in the future. Well done to the team that made this game so much fun.

developer_response.body: Hello max.847274, we're absolutely thrilled to hear that you've enjoyed our experience so much! It means the world to us to receive such positive feedback, and knowing that you're eager for more adventures truly warms our hearts.  It's comments like yours that makes all the hard work worth it! Lots of cheese & crackers for you!

reviews.review_description: I can’t get the engines running, I have the 4 wheels working but can’t go further than that… Can someone help me ?

reviews.review_title: A grand adventure for a grand duo
reviews.review_description: I love Wallace and Gromit so much and seeing the dynamic duo in be is incredible. The game is excellent and a must have for all Wallace and Gromit or aardman fans
